is an actress from Kerala who is well known for her roles in Malayalam-language television serials.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

["ജീവിതത്തിൽ ഇങ്ങനെയൊരു അവസ്ഥ നിങ്ങളും അനുഭവിച്ചുണ്ടാകും! ബ്ലെസ്സി കുര്യന്‍റെ വാക്കുകൾ"](https://malayalam.samayam.com/tv/celebrity-gossips/actress-and-anchor-blessy-kurien-latest-instagram-pics-goes-viral/articleshow/75231917.cms). *malayalam.samayam.com*.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Indian actress

| Blessy Kurien | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Born | (1993-07-19) 19 July 1993 (age 32)  [Kottayam](/wiki/Kottayam "Kottayam"), [Kerala](/wiki/Kerala "Kerala"), [India](/wiki/India "India") |
| Occupation | [Actress](/wiki/Actress "Actress") |

**Blessy Kurien** is an actress from Kerala who is well known for her roles in Malayalam-language television serials.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Filmography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Blessy_Kurien&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Filmography")]

| Year | Title | Role | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2013 | Oru Thundu Padam | Clara | Short film[[3]](#cite_note-3) |
| 2014 | Image | Aswathy | Short film |
| 2015 | Rainbow 4 | Gauri and Rithu | Short film |
| 2015 | [Rasputin](/wiki/Rasputin_(2015_film) "Rasputin (2015 film)") | Bus Passenger |  |
| 2015 | [Aadu](/wiki/Aadu_(film) "Aadu (film)") | Veterinary Doctor |  |
| 2016 | Popcorn | Jayabharati |  |
| 2019 | [Oru Yamandan Premakadha](/wiki/Oru_Yamandan_Premakadha "Oru Yamandan Premakadha") | College Student |  |
| 2019 | [Uyare](/wiki/Uyare "Uyare") | Air Hostess |  |
| 2024 | [Abraham Ozler](/wiki/Abraham_Ozler "Abraham Ozler") | Channel Reporter |  |
| 2024 | [Varshangalkku Shesham](/wiki/Varshangalkku_Shesham "Varshangalkku Shesham") | Costume Designer |  |
| 2024 | [Bazooka](/wiki/Bazooka_(film) "Bazooka (film)") |  |  |

| 2019–2022 | [Chembarathi (TV series)](/wiki/Chembarathi_(TV_series) "Chembarathi (TV series)") | Nandana Aravind | [Zee Keralam](/wiki/Zee_Keralam "Zee Keralam")[[4]](#cite_note-4) |
